subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of God, revealed from the realm of transcendent glory, and through them doth mercy descend upon all created things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات الله قد نزلت من جبروت عز علیا و بها ینزل الرحمة علی الممکنات
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @idolatry
